outlets.name: CNN
outlets.headline: US and Iranian militaries trade shots as Strait of Hormuz tensions escalate
outlets.summary: CNN reports US and Iran exchanged fire during Project Freedom Hormuz escort operation. 6 Iranian boats destroyed. Both sides deny being struck.

outlets.name: Washington Post
outlets.headline: Iran fires on U.S. ships in Strait of Hormuz, in threat to ceasefire
outlets.summary: WaPo frames Iran as aggressor threatening fragile ceasefire. Notes both sides blame each other for Hormuz escalation.

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: Trump announces 'Project Freedom' to guide ships through Strait of Hormuz
outlets.summary: Fox frames Project Freedom as Trump decisive leadership. Emphasizes US military strength and Iran backing down.

outlets.name: The Hill
outlets.headline: Pete Hegseth defends Army chief firing, Iran military actions in hot House hearing
outlets.summary: The Hill covers contentious Hegseth testimony. War Powers Act dispute and cost of war dominate hearing.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: War preparations under way in Iran as Hormuz tensions with US escalate
outlets.summary: AJ reports Iran mobilizing for potentially lengthy conflict. Maj. Gen. Abdollahi warns all foreign forces in Hormuz will be targeted.

outlets.name: NPR
outlets.headline: The U.S. fights to reopen the Strait of Hormuz as UAE says it's attacked by Iran
outlets.summary: NPR provides balanced coverage of multi-front escalation: Hormuz naval clash, UAE missile attacks, and Project Freedom operations.

outlets.name: Times of Israel
outlets.headline: 20 Israeli fighter jets strike in Yemen after Houthi missile hits Ben Gurion Airport
outlets.summary: ToI covers IAF massive retaliation against Yemen. 9 targets struck with 50 munitions after Houthi missile penetrated Arrow defense.

outlets.name: Haaretz
outlets.headline: Trump Says Iran Will Be 'Blown Off the Face of the Earth' if They Attack U.S. Navy Vessels
outlets.summary: Haaretz covers Trump escalation rhetoric alongside IDF high readiness posture and Netanyahu security consultations.

outlets.name: PressTV
outlets.headline: Iran open to diplomacy if US drops its excessive demands: FM
outlets.summary: PressTV frames Iran as willing peace partner blocked by unreasonable US demands. Emphasizes Pakistan mediation progress.

outlets.name: PressTV
outlets.headline: Iran's resilience pays off with major strategic gains as US pressure tactics fail
outlets.summary: Iranian state media claims strategic victory narrative. Frames Hormuz blockade as successful leverage against US aggression.
